threats.scenario: A 1024-bit RSA private key is committed to the public repository. Anyone cloning the repo can sign arbitrary JWTs, enabling silent privilege escalation to admin across every tenant.
threats.mitigation_title: Externalize the RSA key to a runtime-only secret store

steps: Move the private key out of the repository and load it from an env var or secret store at startup
Rotate the key and revoke all existing JWTs
Add a pre-commit hook that rejects files matching `BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY`
